teachingHint: Your child is learning the /oa/ sound (a long 'oh' sound, as in 'boat'). When 'o' and 'a' sit together, they make one sound: /oa/. Help your child spot 'oa' and blend: b-oa-t → boat. The underlined words are for your child to read — you can help with the rest!
